overview.description: The iShares Large Cap 10% Target Buffer Jun ETF (TENJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to track the price return of the iShares Core S&P 500 ETF (IVV) up to a cap, with a 10% downside hedge over a one-year period. The actively managed fund obtains exposure by holding IVV shares and options. TENJ was launched on Oct 21, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.
